name: Scope GitHub verify by changed app
description: Make the GitHub verify workflow run only the affected app checks and avoid installing or testing the unrelated workspace package.
evidence: .github/workflows/verify-code.yml now filters web, worker, and verify-workflow/shared root changes separately; a single verify job installs dependencies once and then runs only the affected web and/or worker checks; validation completed locally by reviewing the workflow diff and parsing the workflow YAML structure.
